subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Muhammad! Upon thee be the peace of God, the Single, the Peerless One. We have verily made mention of thee aforetime, and at this hour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل محمد علیک سلام الله الفرد لااحد انا ذکرناک من قبل و فی هذا الحین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for prosperity
